Chicken Parm Lasagna

01:48

Chicken Parm Lasagna combines the best ingredients from two popular Italian dishes to make one insanely good dish. Fried chicken breast incorporated into lasagna adds a ton of crunchy goodness to an already decadent meal.

Chicken Parm Lasagna

01:48

Chicken Parm Lasagna combines the best ingredients from two popular Italian dishes to make one insanely good dish. Fried chicken breast incorporated into lasagna adds a ton of crunchy goodness to an already decadent meal.
